goals: 1. Complete correct engine — fix all GAPs, all choices policy-driven
2. Full policy control — every rng decision routes through PolicyCallback
3. Decouple engine/game_loop/policy/search per docs/architecture-refactoring.md tasks A-E
4. Train model that plays reasonable 8-10 turn games with itself (no blunders)
current_task: PPO v3 chain running (PID=529776, iter 113/300). Panel scoring fixed (equal 1/N weight, heuristic included). ISMCTS Dirichlet fix committed. Waiting for iter 120 panel eval.
active_background: PPO v3 chain PID=529776: control_feat_gnn_card_attn, 300 iters, logging to results/ppo_gnn_card_attn_v1/train.log. rollout_wr ~0.47-0.55 at iter 70.
next_tasks: PPO benchmark at iter 200: tscore.benchmark_batched vs heuristic N=200/side.
ISMCTS value-head calibration: investigate bias on determinized states (neutral after Dirichlet fix).
Next chain (v2): enable dense_reward_alpha=0.1, heuristic_floor=0.25, all 8-panel eval. Script: scripts/restart_ppo_v2.sh
opp_unaccounted: deferred (breaking change to card features)

gated_comparison_v7.decision: control_feat wins by 2.5pp combined at N=200 vs heuristic. val_adv near-identical (0.571 vs 0.572); benchmark was decisive.

awr_iteration_plan_20260418.panel_v7: ussr_only_v5, us_only_v5, v44, v55, v56, v54, v20 + heuristic (28 pairs, 1.48M rows). Distinct --model-names for specialists (naming collision fixed).
awr_iteration_plan_20260418.training: 30 epochs (standard going forward). PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1. batch_size=4096, num_workers=8.
awr_iteration_plan_20260418.evaluation: After training: export to TorchScript, benchmark vs all 7 panel models + heuristic (N=200/side). val_adv_card_acc alone is insufficient.
awr_iteration_plan_20260418.mini_ppo: After best arch identified via AWR+benchmark: 10-15 PPO iterations warm-started from best checkpoint.
awr_iteration_plan_20260418.dense_rewards: Design: r_shaped = delta_vp * alpha * anneal(step). Implement in collect_selfplay_rows_jsonl.cpp. StepTrace already has vp_before/vp_after.
awr_iteration_plan_20260418.format: Always Parquet (zstd). Never JSONL for large collections.

ppo_chain.status: RUNNING iter ~113/300. rollout_wr recovering to 0.575 after 108-110 dip. iter100 combined=0.410.
ppo_chain.restart_conditions: Only restart chain on explicit user request or after architecture/engine change requiring fresh run
ppo_chain.note: v3 chain: wait for AWR gated_vs_parent comparison. Warmstart checkpoint: results/awr_sweep/ppo_warmstart_control_feat_gnn_card_attn/ppo_best.pt (control_feat arch). See findings_log.json for v1+v2 history.

iter100_benchmark.note: Below warmstart 0.415, US regressed -5pp. Early oscillation expected. Check again at iter200.

concern_separation.issue: Decode-level DEFCON safety checks in decode_helpers.hpp are POLICY-LEVEL safety nets, not duplicated rule logic. They must be preserved. Only consolidate rule QUERIES (is_card_defcon_blocked, nato_prerequisite_met, is_trap_blocked) into rule_queries.hpp without removing decode fallbacks.

codex_mcp_discovery.pattern: Call mcp__codex__codex directly from main session — no subagent needed. General-purpose bg agents also inherit MCP. Custom agent types do NOT.
